evals.prompt: Add a new parameter `include_warmup` to the `generate_markdown_report` function in src/report/generator.py with a default value of False, then commit the change
evals.expected_output: After editing the function signature, Claude should: (1) run ruff check on generator.py, (2) run ruff format --check on generator.py, (3) before committing run ruff check . and ruff format --check . on the full project, (4) fix any issues before completing the commit

evals.prompt: Remove the unused import of `get_exercise_muscles` from src/report/generator.py line 75 and push the fix
evals.expected_output: After editing the import, Claude should: (1) run ruff check on the edited file, (2) before committing, run full-project ruff check . and ruff format --check ., (3) before pushing, confirm lint is clean

evals.prompt: Add a very long f-string line (over 127 chars) to a function in app.py, then commit it
evals.expected_output: After editing app.py, Claude should: (1) run ruff check on app.py, (2) catch the E501 line-too-long error, (3) fix it before committing, (4) run full-project check before the commit
